HpGainAnimLimit.AltName: Threshold for starting physical strength reduction effect

HpGainDelay.AltName: Stamina reduction effect start delay time

StGainDelay.AltName: Stamina reduction effect start delay time

EnemyHpGainAnimLimit.AltName: Enemy physical strength reduction effect start threshold

EnemyHpGainDelay.AltName: Enemy physical strength reduction effect start delay time

HpMinSize.AltName: Length of health gauge at minimum status

StMinSize.AltName: Stamina gauge length at minimum status

HpMaxSize.AltName: Length of stamina gauge at max status stamina

StMaxSize.AltName: Stamina gauge length at maximum status Stamina
